---
title: "About"
image: assets/avatar.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/kienbk60
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/kienngynh

---

Test Software Development Engineer with 7+ years of experience in embedded systems and manufacturing automation. Passionate about building reliable engineering infrastructure using Rust, Python, and Go.
